settings.formula_line: Lab-Verified Formula — Batch Tested for Purity
settings.subtitle_text: Pure, raw, and precisely refined — formulated with honest, clean ingredients and backed by science.

settings.stat_text: It delivers a deep, long-lasting clean without the use of harsh chemicals, making it hypoallergenic, non-toxic, vegan-friendly, and safe for skin, pets, and the planet.

settings.heading: Lab-Verified Actives
settings.text: Every active ingredient is independently tested for potency and purity before entering a Science of Raw formulation.

settings.heading: Zero Synthetic Fillers
settings.text: We refuse shortcuts. No parabens, no sulphates, no synthetic binders — only what your skin actually needs.

settings.heading: Precision pH Balance
settings.text: Formulated to match your skin's natural pH for optimal absorption and long-lasting efficacy.

settings.heading: What Makes Science of Raw Different

settings.author: Nikita R.
settings.title: Finally a brand that backs claims with science
settings.text: Every ingredient listed has a purpose. No fluff, no filler. My skin responded beautifully within two weeks.

settings.author: Rohan B.
settings.title: Clinical results at home
settings.text: The efficacy is real. Visible improvement in texture and tone. Dermatologist approved and it shows.

settings.author: Ananya T.
settings.title: Pure, powerful, and precise
settings.text: Zero irritation on my sensitive skin. The clean formula is transparent about every ingredient. Trust established.
